item.title: Dolphin [File Management]
item.itunes:title: Dolphin [File Management]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Dolphin
(File Management)
File Manager
Dolphin is KDE's file manager that lets you navigate and browse the contents of your hard drives, USB sticks, SD cards, and more. Creating, moving, or deleting files and folders is simple and fast.

Dolphin contains plenty of productivity features that will save you time. The multiple tabs and split view features allow navigating multiple folders at the same time, and you can easily drag and drop files between views to move or copy them. Dolphin's right-click menu provides with many quick actions that let you compress, share, and duplicate files, among many other things. You can also add your own custom actions.

Dolphin is very lightweight, but at the same time, you can adapt it to your specific needs. This means that you can carry out your file management exactly the way you want to. Dolphin supports three different view modes: a classic grid view of all the files, a more detailed view, and a tree view. You can also configure most of Dolphin's behavior.

Dolphin can display files and folders from many Internet cloud services and other remote machines as if they were right there on your desktop.

Dolphin also comes with an integrated terminal that allows you to run commands on the current folder. You can extend the capabilities of Dolphin even further with powerful plugins to adapt it to your workflow. You can use the git integration plugin to interact with git repositories, or the Nextcloud plugin to synchronize your files online, and much more.
[read more]
item.description:
Dolphin
(File Management)
File Manager
Dolphin is KDE's file manager that lets you navigate and browse the contents of your hard drives, USB sticks, SD cards, and more. Creating, moving, or deleting files and folders is simple and fast.

Dolphin contains plenty of productivity features that will save you time. The multiple tabs and split view features allow navigating multiple folders at the same time, and you can easily drag and drop files between views to move or copy them. Dolphin's right-click menu provides with many quick actions that let you compress, share, and duplicate files, among many other things. You can also add your own custom actions.

Dolphin is very lightweight, but at the same time, you can adapt it to your specific needs. This means that you can carry out your file management exactly the way you want to. Dolphin supports three different view modes: a classic grid view of all the files, a more detailed view, and a tree view. You can also configure most of Dolphin's behavior.

Dolphin can display files and folders from many Internet cloud services and other remote machines as if they were right there on your desktop.

Dolphin also comes with an integrated terminal that allows you to run commands on the current folder. You can extend the capabilities of Dolphin even further with powerful plugins to adapt it to your workflow. You can use the git integration plugin to interact with git repositories, or the Nextcloud plugin to synchronize your files online, and much more.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Dolphin
(File Management)
File Manager
Dolphin is KDE's file manager that lets you navigate and browse the contents of your hard drives, USB sticks, SD cards, and more. Creating, moving, or deleting files and folders is simple and fast.

Dolphin contains plenty of productivity features that will save you time. The multiple tabs and split view features allow navigating multiple folders at the same time, and you can easily drag and drop files between views to move or copy them. Dolphin's right-click menu provides with many quick actions that let you compress, share, and duplicate files, among many other things. You can also add your own custom actions.

Dolphin is very lightweight, but at the same time, you can adapt it to your specific needs. This means that you can carry out your file management exactly the way you want to. Dolphin supports three different view modes: a classic grid view of all the files, a more detailed view, and a tree view. You can also configure most of Dolphin's behavior.

Dolphin can display files and folders from many Internet cloud services and other remote machines as if they were right there on your desktop.

Dolphin also comes with an integrated terminal that allows you to run commands on the current folder. You can extend the capabilities of Dolphin even further with powerful plugins to adapt it to your workflow. You can use the git integration plugin to interact with git repositories, or the Nextcloud plugin to synchronize your files online, and much more.
[read more]

item.title: Avogadro 2 [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:title: Avogadro 2 [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Avogadro 2
(3D Graphics)
Avogadro libraries provide 3D rendering, visualization, analysis and data processing useful in computational chemistry, molecular modeling, bioinformatics, materials science, and related areas.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Avogadro 2
(3D Graphics)
Avogadro libraries provide 3D rendering, visualization, analysis and data processing useful in computational chemistry, molecular modeling, bioinformatics, materials science, and related areas.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Avogadro 2
(3D Graphics)
Avogadro libraries provide 3D rendering, visualization, analysis and data processing useful in computational chemistry, molecular modeling, bioinformatics, materials science, and related areas.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

item.title: Divoratech [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Divoratech [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: bimex
item.itunes:summary:
Divoratech
(Developers Apps)
"💰 Unlock AI Excellence Without Breaking the Bank! 🚀
Introducing Divora – Your Affordable AI Solution! 🤖
🌟 Don't break the bank for AI! Divora is here for you, empowering everyone, from small businesses to passionate enthusiasts, without costing a fortune! 💸
👩‍💼 Small business owner? 🙋‍♂️ AI enthusiast? Divora welcomes you all with open arms! 🎉
🎩 Say goodbye to costly development! No need to spend millions. Divora's budget-friendly approach makes AI accessible to all! 💰🚀
🔍 No more digging through endless open-source articles or colabs that don't work! Just upload your data, and Divora takes care of the rest. It's AI made easy! 🪄
🧠 For the true AI pioneers, Divora offers complete control over AI training. Build from scratch without breaking the bank! 💡
💡 And here's the game-changer: After training, Divora lets you export the simple code. Your AI, your code, your rules! 📦🛠️
Ready to embrace AI without the high costs and frustrations? Join the AI revolution with Divora! 🌐Your affordable AI adventure begins right here, as of now, anyone including you can build your very one AI🚀✨"

[read more]

[read more]
